trans-unit.source: Default AI Model Provider: Choose which AI provider is used by default across the extension.
Default OpenAI Model: Select which OpenAI model is used by default.
Default Embedding Model: Select the provider and model used for generating embeddings.
Default Gemini Model: Select which Gemini model is used by default.
Default Claude Model: Select which Claude model is used by default.
Default Custom AI Model
Default DeepSeek Model: Select which DeepSeek model is used by default.
Default xAI Model
Default Mistral Model: Select the Mistral model.
Default Translation Model: Select the AI model to use for Auto-Translate, Re-Translate, and Mass-Translate operations.
OpenAI API Key: Enter your OpenAI API key. Used for ChatGPT and related models.
OpenAI Admin API Key: Enter your OpenAI admin API key. Required for viewing usage statistics.
Default ChatGPT Model: Select the default ChatGPT model. You can still switch models when using individual AI features.
OpenAI Image Model: Select the OpenAI image model.
DALL-E 3
GPT Image 1
Temperature: Controls response randomness (0–2). Lower values give focused answers; higher values give more creative outputs.
Max Tokens
Set the maximum length of the AI's response. Higher values allow longer replies but may increase cost and processing time.
OpenAI-Compatible API URL: Enter the endpoint URL for your self-hosted or open-source OpenAI-compatible model.
OpenAI-Compatible API Key: Enter the API key for your self-hosted or open-source model endpoint.
OpenAI-Compatible Model Name: Enter the model name as defined in your self-hosted model endpoint.
Text Embedding Model
Gemini API Key: Enter your Gemini API key.
Gemini API Model: Select the Gemini API model.
Anthropic API Key: Enter your API key from console.anthropic.com.
Claude API Model: Select the Claude API model.
Anthropic API Key: Enter your API key from console.anthropic.com.
Claude Model: Select the Claude model you want to use as the default chat model.
Embedding Provider: Select the provider to use for embeddings (Claude does not provide native embeddings).
Embedding Model: Select the embedding model for your chosen provider. Options depend on the provider selected above.
Temperature: Controls response randomness (0–1). Lower values give more precise answers; higher values give more varied outputs.
Azure API Key: Enter your Azure API key.
API Endpoint: Enter your Azure API endpoint.
Azure Deployment Name: Enter the deployment name you configured for your GPT model in Azure OpenAI Studio.
API version: Enter your API version.
Enable Custom AI Model: Activate a custom AI engine endpoint instead of a standard provider.
Custom AI Model API URL: Enter the base URL of your custom AI model API.
Custom LLM API Key Backend: Enter your custom LLM API key for backend.
Model List Endpoint URL: Enter the URL used to fetch available models from your custom AI endpoint.
Custom LLM Model Name: Enter the name of the custom LLM model.
Maximum Crawl Depth: Limit how many levels deep the custom AI engine will process content.
DeepSeek API Key: Enter your DeepSeek API key.
DeepSeek Model: Select the DeepSeek model.
DeepSeek Temperature: Select temperature for DeepSeek model.
Response Format: Select the response format.
DeepSeek Stop: Enter the stop sequence.
DeepSeek Stream: Check to enable stream.
DeepSeek Stream Options: Additional options for streamed responses. Only configure this if streaming is enabled.
DeepSeek Tools: Enter tools.
DeepSeek Tool Choice: Enter tool choice.
DeepSeek Logprobs: Check to enable logprobs.
xAI API Key: Enter your xAI API key.
xAI Model: Select the xAI model.
xAI Temperature: Select temperature for xAI model.
xAI Response Format: Select the response format for xAI.
Mistral API Key: Enter your Mistral API key.
Mistral Model: Select the Mistral model.
Mistral Temperature: Select temperature for Mistral model.
Max Tokens: Set the maximum number of tokens the model can generate in a response.
DeepL API Key: Enter your DeepL API key.
DeepL API URL: Enter your DeepL API URL.
Google Translate API Key: Enter your Google API key.
Google Translate API URL: Enter your Google Translate API URL.
Enable Basic Authentication Support: If your website is protected by HTTP Basic Authentication, enable this so the extension can still access it.
Basic Auth Username: Enter username for basic authentication.
Basic Auth Password: Enter password for basic authentication.
Enable email notification on API quota or authentication errors
Notification email address (recipient for API quota exceeded or incorrect API key errors)
